CompleteIntakeFacts.description:
Complete intake facts for 'complete' status requests.

Enforces that four core fields are present and non-None:
- sender_actor_id (required, always)
- receiver_name OR receiver_stable_id (at least one required)
- pickup_location (required)
- drop_off_location (required)

Optional fields (can be None if not captured):
- sender_display_name
- parcel_declared_content
- preferred_period

parcel_declared_content.description: Sender's declared description of contents (1-4000 chars).
parcel_declared_content.title: Parcel Declared Content

preferred_period.description: Requester's preferred timeframe (orientative, free text, 1-4000 chars).
preferred_period.title: Preferred Period

receiver_name.description: Human-supplied name of the receiver (1-4000 chars).
receiver_name.title: Receiver Name

receiver_stable_id.description: Stable business identifier for the receiver.
receiver_stable_id.title: Receiver Stable Id

sender_actor_id.description: URN-style actor identifier of the sender (required).
sender_actor_id.title: Sender Actor Id

sender_display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the sender.
sender_display_name.title: Sender Display Name

CompleteIntakeFacts.title: CompleteIntakeFacts

IntakeFacts.description:
Sparse intake facts for new and needsClarification parcel requests.

Allows up to 8 fields with nullable human-text inputs (1-4000 chars each).
Receiver identity satisfied by either name OR stable_id (both allowed).
No missing/clarification/error fields; those belong in IntakeResult.

parcel_declared_content.description: Sender's declared description of contents (1-4000 chars).
parcel_declared_content.title: Parcel Declared Content

preferred_period.description: Requester's preferred timeframe (orientative, free text, 1-4000 chars).
preferred_period.title: Preferred Period

receiver_name.description: Human-supplied name of the receiver (1-4000 chars).
receiver_name.title: Receiver Name

receiver_stable_id.description: Stable business identifier for the receiver.
receiver_stable_id.title: Receiver Stable Id

sender_actor_id.description: URN-style actor identifier of the sender (chain identity).
sender_actor_id.title: Sender Actor Id

sender_display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the sender.
sender_display_name.title: Sender Display Name

IntakeFacts.title: IntakeFacts

description:
Immutable snapshot of a delivery request state.

Enforces nested schema equality and sparse/complete contradictions:
- For 'new' and 'needsClarification' states: sparse IntakeFacts allowed
- For 'complete' state: CompleteIntakeFacts required, empty missing_fields
- Timestamps: created_at immutable, updated_at authoritative, closed_at nullable

facts.description: Sparse or complete intake facts depending on status.
facts.title: Facts

missing_fields.description: Immutable tuple of field names not yet provided.
missing_fields.title: Missing Fields

request_id.description: Graph node ID for this delivery request.
request_id.title: Request Id

status.description: Request lifecycle status (new, needsClarification, complete, etc.).
status.title: Status

updated_at.description: When the request was last modified (authoritative).
updated_at.title: Updated At

title: DeliveryRequestSnapshot
